Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sage of the Endless Sword]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — The Sage of the Endless Sword vanished from the region a few months prior.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — The Sage of the Endless Sword has a disciple.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The Sage of the Endless Sword trained Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — The Sage of the Endless Sword is a master of sword Paths.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — The Sage of the Endless Sword is a notable figure mentioned by Eithan.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — The Sage of the Endless Sword was killed not long ago.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Sage of the Endless Sword is a title/entity.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Sage of the Endless Sword is one of three Sages who manifested the Sword Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin intends to be the next Sage of the Endless Sword.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — The Sage of the Endless Sword used a way into the labyrinth.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin is the disciple of the Sage of the Endless Sword.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
